title: Revesby Lancaster Memorial
crew_summary: 7 killed including pilot Flg Off. Wallace Bell Jardine

external_narratives.summary: Heritage record for the Avro Lancaster aircraft crash site at Revesby. Documents the site as a registered heritage monument in Lincolnshire's historic environment record (MLI125802).
key_details: Registered crash site in county heritage record

external_narratives.summary: Detailed page about the Avro Lancaster III ND415 memorial in St Lawrence Church, Revesby. The aircraft collided with Lancaster LL967 of 57 Squadron while preparing to land after a bombing run to Brunswick; LL967 landed safely but ND415 crashed at Revesby with loss of all seven crew.
key_details: Mid-air collision with Lancaster LL967 of 57 Squadron

external_narratives.summary: War Memorials Online listing for the memorial plaque to crew of 97 Squadron Lancaster ND415 OF-B at Revesby. Community-maintained record with memorial condition assessment.
key_details: Memorial plaque in St Lawrence Church

external_narratives.summary: IWM War Memorials Register combined entry for the Revesby WW2 war memorial and the crew of Lancaster ND415. The wooden panel commemorates both parish war dead and the Lancaster crew, with badges of the Army, Royal Navy and RAF.
key_details: Combined memorial for parish and Lancaster crew
Military service badges attached to wooden panel

external_narratives.summary: Article discussing Lancaster losses from RAF Coningsby, including ND415. Provides context of 97 Squadron operations in the lead-up to D-Day, noting the crew had flown six previous operations before their loss.
key_details: Crew had completed six previous operations
Part of 97 Squadron's intensive pre-D-Day operations from Coningsby

local_contacts.role: Local authority responsible for memorial upkeep

sources: Postcodes.io — Revesby village East Lindsey PE22 at 53.134 -0.058
location_confidence.verification_notes: CORRECTION. Current coords (53.059, -0.198) ~8km south and ~15km west. Revesby PE22 near Horncastle at 53.134, -0.058.
